title: hieracium tanythrix
intro: Hieracium tanythrix, also known as hawkweed or false hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium tanythrix include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and skin health. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for its medicinal and cosmetic uses.
